name: Bill Hagerty
subject: did you see my interview on Fox News?
body:
I joined Fox News with Shannon Bream to discuss President Trump's Great American Economic Revival Industry Groups
Peter,President Trump asked me to join his Economic Advisory Board because he knows I have the strength and the courage to stand up in crises like this and the economic experience to get it done.In my interview on Fox News, I discussed everything we're doing to fight the Wuhan coronavirus and safely reopen the American economy. [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuddlg-fuutjhhtj-r/) [Watch My Interview on Fox News](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuddlg-fuutjhhtj-y/) As President Trump leads us through this crisis, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer continue to play politics.The Paycheck Protection Program, which has provided critical loans to 1.6 million small businesses, has been exhausted.But Chuck and Nancy refused to increase PPP, putting more American workers out of work and putting more American businesses out of business. [**You can watch the whole interview here.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuddlg-fuutjhhtj-j/)Thank you for your time.Bill HagertyCandidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuddlg-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuddlg-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuddlg-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuddlg-fuutjhhtj-u/)

name: Team Cory
subject: Here's what's keeping Cory going
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Times are tough, here's some hope |
#
Friends -- With all that's going on, it can be easy to feel overwhelmed by the news. Above all, we hope you can find time to take care of yourself and your loved ones as we all navigate this unprecedented crisis together. We had a feeling Cory would have some good suggestions on places to find inspiration and love during these trying times -- he's usually _great_ for that kind of thing -- so we asked him for a round-up of stories that have made him smile lately. And as usual, he delivered. **Here are a few highlights he sent us:** First, **[don't miss the story about this ShopRite worker in Paramus](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e50/5fca0d19/7d979818/291d6c46/3773254221/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.nj.com/togethernj/2020/04/meet-the-nj-shoprite-worker-wholl-brighten-your-day-singing-about-social-distancing.html")** who will go out of her way to brighten your day with a song about social distancing while you shop. [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e50/5fca0d19/7d979818/291d6c46/3773254221/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.nj.com/togethernj/2020/04/meet-the-nj-shoprite-worker-wholl-brighten-your-day-singing-about-social-distancing.html")
_Photo via nj.com_ **Grab some tissues** : Catch up on this heartwarming tale of one town in New Jersey coming together to throw**[their local Disney princess the birthday surprise of her dreams](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e50/5fca0d19/7d979818/291d6c45/3773254221/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.nj.com/coronavirus/2020/04/nj-girl-gets-her-own-disney-parade-after-make-a-wish-trip-cancelled-video.html")** after her Make-A-Wish trip to the theme park was canceled. Who knew so many of our Disney favorites lived in Upper Township? **Celebrating a hero** : A World War II veteran in Hamilton was ready to celebrate his 100th birthday with a party. Unfortunately, the coronavirus canceled those plans, but that didn't stop his neighbors **[from throwing him a huge parade throughout the town](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e50/5fca0d19/7d979818/291d6c44/3773254221/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.nj.com/news/j66j-2020/03/0edc4317695474/coronavirus-no-match-for-this-100yearold-veterans-birthday-neighbors-threw-him-a-parade.html")** to recognize his big day. **Staying in touch** : A Williamstown-based company wanted to make sure local veterans had an easy way to keep in touch with loved ones while we all do our part to flatten the curve by staying home. Thanks to laptops they donated, residents of the Veterans Memorial Home in Vineland can **[continue to visit with their friends and family](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e50/5fca0d19/7d979818/291d6c43/3773254221/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.nj.com/cumberland/2020/04/nj-company-donated-laptops-so-veterans-can-keep-in-touch-with-loved-ones-during-coronavirus.html")** while also protecting their health and safety. [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e50/5fca0d19/7d979818/291d6c43/3773254221/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.nj.com/cumberland/2020/04/nj-company-donated-laptops-so-veterans-can-keep-in-touch-with-loved-ones-during-coronavirus.html")
_Photo via nj.com_ These are just a few of the many stories of hope, love, community, and resilience that are keeping Cory going lately, even as tough times are still ahead for New Jersey and so many other states affected by the coronavirus across the country. We hope some of these made you smile and can act as a reminder about the healing power our love for each other can have. **Have a favorite local story that brought a smile to your face or hope to your heart? Cory would love to hear about them, too! Reply to this email or tweet the tales that are keeping your spirits high to him directly at @CoryBooker.** To keep up to date about the latest coronavirus-related news, head to www.usa.gov/coronavirus. Take care, Team Cory

---
PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
---

subject: Can you keep a secret?

body: Peter, I have exciting news to share with you but you have to keep it a secret. Our beautiful First Lady's birthday is on April 26th, and I've got a great idea to make her birthday extra special this year. I'm planning a HUGE surprise and I need your help to pull it off. Melania does so much for our Nation and I want to make sure she knows just how much she means to us. I want to surprise her with a birthday card signed by 1 MILLION Americans from all around the Country wishing her a 'Happy Birthday.' Here's the best part: If you sign the card by 11:59 PM TONIGHT, you can even send her a personal note. Please sign the First Lady's Official Birthday Card IMMEDIATELY to have your name be one of the first she sees on the card. >> http://email.granitelists.com/ct/54938471:snEE2j-NF:m:3:1155937413:66008F69CC37A94C8796E5EDA1352B2C:r We all know that Melania is an amazing First Lady and an incredible wife. It's really important to me that she knows just how much the American People appreciate her, but I can't do it without you. When you sign her card, you can even leave a personal note for her to read - she will love it! Help me wish Melania a 'Happy Birthday' by adding your name NOW. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/54938471:snEE2j-NF:m:3:1155937413:66008F69CC37A94C8796E5EDA1352B2C:r Together, we can give the love of my life another fantastic birthday. [**But without in-person events, raising money is harder than ever. name: MJ Hegar
subject: protecting our communities AND our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We need to start preparing NOW for a safe and secure election.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890352/7f51f7bc/4f668824/4ef11952/4195690713/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

This November, it's important to make sure that _no one_ has to choose between casting a ballot and keeping their family safe and healthy. In order to protect both our democracy and our communities, we need to start preparing NOW for a safe and secure election.

It's unfortunate (but not surprising) that Sen. Cornyn is refusing to take action. He says that if voters "can go to the grocery store they can go to the polls." All 50 states, including Texas, already allow many people to vote by mail -- and with social distancing in effect across the country it's not hard to see why it's only common sense that we should allow _everyone_ to do so now. **[DONATE TO DEFEAT
SEN. CORNYN >> ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890352/7f51f7bc/4f668824/4ef11951/4195690713/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200418.1nd__1255__&amount=10")** With _The Hill_ reporting that Sen. Cornyn is facing his "toughest race yet," it's obvious why he doesn't want more Texans to vote by mail. But Texans (and all Americans) deserve a senator who puts our physical health and safety ahead of self-interest.

I've worked my entire life to do what's right, from flying rescue missions in Afghanistan to taking on both parties _and_ the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women. That mission will continue in the Senate, and you can bet I'll _never_ put partisan politics ahead of Texans' safety.

**But I need your help to win this race. If you 're able to do so, will you make a donation to my campaign today to help me defeat Sen. clean_body: We need to start preparing NOW for a safe and secure election. | "" | | Peter, This November, it's important to make sure that no one has to choose between casting a ballot and keeping their family safe and healthy. In order to protect both our democracy and our communities, we need to start preparing NOW for a safe and secure election. It's unfortunate (but not surprising) that Sen. Cornyn is refusing to take action. He says that if voters "can go to the grocery store they can go to the polls." All 50 states, including Texas, already allow many people to vote by mail -- and with social distancing in effect across the country it's not hard to see why it's only common sense that we should allow everyone to do so now. "" With The Hill reporting that Sen. Cornyn is facing his "toughest race yet," it's obvious why he doesn't want more Texans to vote by mail. But Texans (and all Americans) deserve a senator who puts our physical health and safety ahead of self-interest. I've worked my entire life to do what's right, from flying rescue missions in Afghanistan to taking on both parties and the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women. That mission will continue in the Senate, and you can bet I'll never put partisan politics ahead of Texans' safety. But I need your help to win this race. If you 're able to do so, will you make a donation to my campaign today to help me defeat Sen. Cornyn this November and fight for ALL Texans in the U.S. Senate? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, MJ Hegar "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". #
Hello — I had hoped to share better news, but my team says we fell a bit short of our mid-month fundraising goal yesterday. **So, I am officially extending the deadline to see if we can close the gap by Sunday at midnight. ** You see, our campaign is funded by grassroots donations from folks like you — not corporate PACs or right-wing megadonors from Mitch McConnell’s rolodex who can write unlimited checks. None of us could have ever imagined a situation as difficult as the one we’re in right now — and unless our campaign adapts, we will fall behind. Every dollar we raise during this critical moment helps us reshape our campaign strategy in the wake of this pandemic. So, I’m asking one more time if I can count on you to step up today: **We’re actually quite close to hitting this goal, which means your donation could be the one that gets us there. Thanks to President Trump, Arizona will have a seat at the table and help inform the strategy for a strong economic recovery that prioritizes the safety of Americans everywhere.

Friend,

I am honored to be selected by President Trump to serve on the bipartisan task force to plan our path forward as a nation. Now, Arizona will have a seat at the table and help inform the strategy for a strong economic recovery that prioritizes the safety of Americans everywhere.

I am proud of the work my fellow GOP Senators and I have accomplished in helping President Trump respond to the crisis at hand. However, I can't help but think how things might be different if Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats were in charge. After all, they are still blocking critical relief funding for small businesses. If they continue to outraise and outspend us at the rate they currently are, Democrats could very well take control in November.

[**Can you chip in $5, $25, $50 or whatever you can to help power our campaign and keep Arizona 's Senate seat RED? My opponent is breaking fundraising records, so every dollar helps ensure we have the resources to fight back!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oZ_l7E2tbE7wC7aPZLxPTnrgUAs7xob1qAw3HSHCWl2fcU_kckJRNsCnnqw1PxoGvVwnJGMhoVZc2-uZ_qHXX8lCL1uWEpG-Xhe8iSTD4YRtCtTjKvQN-jFaIr9dmzbOhqIWX-PASPB91hheElu06JdilJ4SUQV1lAJ7zd3Kucc13zlBZNF1hidV4d5zBBJ0qw-IoGO-Cz5aWAEzjrktyT9xIMhiMN4MqK3ksRTQ9r7FkgTeCAF869B5jDPg4h__zx7ZhQl8sZBhzJGWUL7yyXWbsuDQSevhUR4vUER1EbfE9FH4UZ_CE6JIRbhBh84FxiVwKO-dhVXtpbOjvlFlYW0qLWJGdf1I0Ml9sZITl8CLsaLHzr0FM-zmNOWAm60zX8oNiXT4qYSK4DE5sUpl68DFJOU2s4i_&c=NF9VwragkrRHOG0yGIXeLegUtnrEErUScdBe5bKdB3EQOphQ2wcsWg==&ch=vI1-e73CgRLT6bvsKpBN3b7Y2JXNrWW3zdEjLiwHdngBWHZ9UkesUQ==)

Arizona is a battleground state that is ranked at the top of Democrats' list to turn blue. Millions have been spent from far-left groups already, and it will only get worse.

**My opponent is beholden to liberal special interests and the Democratic Machine.** Chuck Schumer, who is leading the charge to BLOCK emergency relief funding for American workers and small businesses, is personally supporting my opponent. Democrats are just 4 seats away from having total control of the Senate's and America's agenda and they are desperate to flip Arizona.

[**Make an immediate donation and help power our campaign so we can keep fighting for YOU >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oZ_l7E2tbE7wC7aPZLxPTnrgUAs7xob1qAw3HSHCWl2fcU_kckJRNsCnnqw1PxoGsGh55xjBnYM1VdaVInNC-IESTwSDaNcjpnsRkx-CcamppBg_-cQsBQul_NmA6AKQT8lDQ-Gfo-nDpAwKJxt8--Q2r8gBhHiOJHwqrxvEZjj-De7Zi5Ut0dZYPYvowX21khBBKKJ_W9Jvzu7DmjnMQTB9ROq5HdBV8dixFYqzMCM1swpY0_5B0t6MszrtDjh_65JfyzSY3c33Zz36KpFgH9Rxp-Gx7O8j0OSelG3ODkMUiK5pN6t1hXgoI8E00SJwhITMN-4WB97exFW5DiQ1Qkh196JR7np33AVmjXUt7SyDtW_9tFH7o6-vr1tt0KX-YujtQOwux6Y8cBqVdnIRfMn39H_ZoTad&c=NF9VwragkrRHOG0yGIXeLegUtnrEErUScdBe5bKdB3EQOphQ2wcsWg==&ch=vI1-e73CgRLT6bvsKpBN3b7Y2JXNrWW3zdEjLiwHdngBWHZ9UkesUQ==)

Martha McSally

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi's handpicked candidate outraised us and announced a massive fundraising haul -- _$927,000.00._ That's nearly one million dollars to spend attacking us.

**It 's important so we'll keep this short: we're getting outraised by Harley Rouda and Pelosi's dark money machine. If we don't act now, we won't be able to make up the difference.**

[**Can we count on you to chip in just $10 to help close the gap?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YH_ZSW-Gh8V1L3xvHPXumTN3NQN8AOAtFAXdwCFnxycvVot4lGzBFcM1D49vDo5RXka-Hf9qsMHsC0gC2wNLbfq85ebc6Oc7ECzwSTacu6ldhf_4LsoF2aJfwQniR_yclrlE3eshCQ1ddxkZ_0vCqbSFwnDQ85rtF5NlqewkzyCMocQ__Ex0b_bfAdfToT3GOBQNDP76Q3Xd-_NZ5BHCM1RDkZSUG7QKlfnF3MZ-Bk84tKveByTEBGxZ4-beJcUVhdYgctD_hSchOXMj2BXci5qpCuk2rkKN_kSEHtmgiXPhIuJu8ZS8dtcr5n2k9k9CKhkaOec8_cRBBCizXqGEPLblHwDPjTdstY_6lDaNc6Y=&c=tdQnrFS8cYacGo5bWuUvctSZpbYHWsx8E3t2Ik3dl8EfbCEMFoQYSQ==&ch=ZJXOId2UG36sdvA3NkJCPN6rN76HymO2E6FL346_sUKj3irPIAp8Aw==)

If we don't catch up, we will lose this seat in November -- and our chance to take back the House for Republicans.

We won't be able to pull this off without your help. [**Please make a $10 donation before it 's too late to catch up.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YH_ZSW-Gh8V1L3xvHPXumTN3NQN8AOAtFAXdwCFnxycvVot4lGzBFcM1D49vDo5RXka-Hf9qsMHsC0gC2wNLbfq85ebc6Oc7ECzwSTacu6ldhf_4LsoF2aJfwQniR_yclrlE3eshCQ1ddxkZ_0vCqbSFwnDQ85rtF5NlqewkzyCMocQ__Ex0b_bfAdfToT3GOBQNDP76Q3Xd-_NZ5BHCM1RDkZSUG7QKlfnF3MZ-Bk84tKveByTEBGxZ4-beJcUVhdYgctD_hSchOXMj2BXci5qpCuk2rkKN_kSEHtmgiXPhIuJu8ZS8dtcr5n2k9k9CKhkaOec8_cRBBCizXqGEPLblHwDPjTdstY_6lDaNc6Y=&c=tdQnrFS8cYacGo5bWuUvctSZpbYHWsx8E3t2Ik3dl8EfbCEMFoQYSQ==&ch=ZJXOId2UG36sdvA3NkJCPN6rN76HymO2E6FL346_sUKj3irPIAp8Aw==)

name: Caroline
subject: FW: quick favor
body:
Friend, I hope you are well. Forwarding along a request I received from Senator Cornyn this morning about you.
He's been asking me over the last few days whether or not you've joined his Leadership Team, which he re-opened for enrollment in response to COVID-19.
He wants to make sure that every Texas Republican has a chance to join his select team of civilian advisors, since he's unable to get your advice in person.
**[For your convenience, I've pasted your personalized link below. clean_body: Friend, I hope you are well. Forwarding along a request I received from Senator Cornyn this morning about you. He's been asking me over the last few days whether or not you've joined his Leadership Team, which he re-opened for enrollment in response to COVID-19. He wants to make sure that every Texas Republican has a chance to join his select team of civilian advisors, since he's unable to get your advice in person. == Senator Cornyn will be asking for an update soon! name: Team Hicks
subject: RE: Reporting back
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Did you see the message from Josh, friends?

Andy Barr is powered by Mitch McConnell’s dark money machine.

But Josh isn’t taking a dime from giant corporations or dirty money PACs. This campaign is powered by grassroots, small-dollar donors. Every contribution — $5, $50, or $100 — will help fuel our fight to bring change for the people of Kentucky.

Thanks to folks like you, we were able to stay true to our values and still hit our best fundraising quarter of this campaign. This campaign is still far from over, so we hope you’ll chip in and help us crack another fundraising goal this quarter.

Thanks from our team to you,

Team Hicks

Chip in $5
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?amount=5?refcode=HIC_20200418_em_fr_eoqreport2_all_pt1

---------- Forwarded Message ----------

From: Josh Hicks
Date: April 16, 2020
Subject: Reporting back

Yesterday was the first FEC reporting deadline of the year, friends .
You can tell a lot about a campaign from its supporters. In our case, that’s you: hardworking folks who have chipped in what you can, because you believe in our movement.
But Andy Barr’s report yesterday showed something else entirely: the power of the Mitch McConnell corporate cash machine. Even with our economy shut down, Barr continued to rake in corporate cash. Nearly 60% of his fundraising came from PACs, not people — and he brought in over $40,000 from Corporate PACs alone.
Our campaign doesn’t take corporate donations. We don’t have a PAC. We’re not going to take checks from special interests. We’re raising money $5, $50, and $100 at a time. And it’s working.
We had our strongest fundraising quarter of this campaign, and we did it all while staying true to our values.
Our hard work and your dedication is getting noticed. Just a few weeks ago, we earned the endorsement of VoteVets, the largest advocacy group of veterans working to elect Democrats across the country.
So thank you for being on our team, and thank you for helping us grow this campaign from an idea into a movement
Thank you from everyone here,
Josh (for Brett, Nate, Nicole, Lee, and Hadley)
Donate [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200418_em_fr_eoqreport2_all_pt2]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200416_em_fr_eoqreport1_all_ftr1 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200418_em_fr_eoqreport2_all_pt3]
Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.
He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200416_em_fr_eoqreport1_all_ftr2]
CONTRIBUTE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-apr?refcode=HIC_20200416_em_fr_eoqreport1_all_ftr3]

name: =?utf-8?Q?=22Sean=20Rose=2C=20Team=20Janet=22?=
subject: Just wanted to reach out
body:
let me know if there's any way I can be of assistance | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7f410cbfcccf/calling-all-patriots-12309854?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7007422155&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Peter,

My name is Sean Rose. I am the Grassroots Engagement and Communications Advisor for Janet's campaign.

We are working hard to ensure that we are engaged with our grassroots supporters so we can defeat Kendra Horn, but we cannot do that without your support. I am here to be your point of contact to help get Janet elected on June 30th and thankful you have chosen to join Janet's winning team.

Janet is the only candidate with 40 years of business experience, proven toughness against the radical left and is ready on day one to take on Nancy Pelosi, Kendra Horn and her socialist friends. We must send an experienced, tough and ready representative to Congress to ensure our conservative Oklahoma values are made known. We are absolutely thrilled and excited to have your support and work together to secure a win on June 30th.

I’ll be reaching out regularly to share specific opportunities and ways you will be able to help Janet secure a win for conservatism on June 30th.

I encourage you to share this message with any friends & family that would be interested in helping Janet become our next congresswoman. A little goes a long way, but we need as much involvement as possible.

Please feel free to forward this email to them with my contact email [Sean@Janet2020.com](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f8147dab3b&e=795c6d9796), or [send them to our website](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=81ef67862f&e=795c6d9796) so they can get signed up.

Thank you for your support for Team Janet and I will be in touch soon with more campaign trail updates!

Respectfully,

Sean Rose
Grassroots Engagement & Communications Advisor
Janet Barresi for Congress 2020
www.Janet2020.com

_P.S. Our campaign remains committed to the safety of our community, staff and supporters as we face the COVID-19 situation.[Visit our Coronavirus Resource Center for more information.](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=65511c267e&e=795c6d9796)_
---
| |
---

**Our mailing address is:**
Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147
[Add us to your address book](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14&e=795c6d9796) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=54eeb9df14&e=795c6d9796&c=819b1988d2).

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: Today, Tuesday, and Thursday:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Powered By People

I wanted to make sure you saw the invite to join Beto in one or all of
three virtual phone banks – happening today, Tuesday, and Thursday.

Right now, we’re seeing unprecedented unemployment, and it’s translating
into unprecedented demand at our food banks. They’re running out of
volunteers to help package and distribute food to those who are in need.

So Beto is asking you to join him in calling prospective volunteers to
fill shifts at the food banks that serve all 254 counties of our great
state. Please sign up now. We need you!

Upcoming events:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34359/signup/?source=ema20200418-85878&t=1001&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu ]Saturday: Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34359/signup/?source=ema20200418-85878&t=1002&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu ]Saturday, April 18, 1:00 PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34359/signup/?source=ema20200418-85878&t=1003&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34360/signup/?source=ema20200418-85878&t=1001&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu ]Tuesday: Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34360/signup/?source=ema20200418-85878&t=1002&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu ]Tuesday, April 21, 6:30 PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34360/signup/?source=ema20200418-85878&t=1003&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34361/signup/?source=ema20200418-85878&t=1001&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu ]Thursday: Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34361/signup/?source=ema20200418-85878&t=1002&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu ]Thursday, April 23, 6:30 PM CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/phone-food-banks/34361/signup/?source=ema20200418-85878&t=1003&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu ]Get more info or RSVP »

This is a moment to find the courage and will to serve our fellow Texans
and human beings at their moment of greatest need.

I hope you’ll join us,

Kate Roberts
Powered by People

P.S. If you can’t volunteer, I hope you’ll consider [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42447?refcode=ema20200418-85878&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu ]donating to support
those in need.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42447?refcode=ema20200418-85878&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=85878%2E444211%2Euhdxeu

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Donald Trump: We Are Reopening America ‘One Careful Step at a Time’ | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d41cd1dd2d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Donald Trump: We Are Reopening America ‘One Careful Step at a Time’**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=72dafa9f48&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Breitbart_
“President Donald Trump on Thursday announced new guidelines for reopening America after the peak of the coronavirus crisis,” Charlie Spiering reports. “We’re starting our life again. We’re starting rejuvenation of our economy again in a safe and structured and a very responsible fashion,” the President said of his three-phase plan.

**See the Guidelines:** [Opening Up America Again](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0d97be3d27&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Democrats Need to Stop Holding Small-Business Help Hostage**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aee1def2a0&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“It’s beyond tragic: The loan program to aid small businesses hit by lockdowns is [now] out of cash, yet Democrats still refuse to OK new funds unless their unrelated demands are met,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “If small-business closures spike, costing countless workers their jobs, Americans shouldn’t forget the Dems’ cynicism.”
---
|
---
| [**'Experience of a Lifetime:' Truck Driver Reacts to Being Saluted by Trump at White House**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=486d4fa931&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
President Trump celebrated American truckers on Thursday for their work keeping our country supplied during the Coronavirus, Joshua Nelson reports. “Getting the honor and respect that I think the 3.5 million truck drivers deserve was just heartwarming because it was not personally me, it's all of us doing our jobs,” Stephen Richardson said.

🚚 **WATCH:** [President Trump welcomes truckers to the South Lawn!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cdd993c68&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| _[Trump Puts U.S. Public Diplomacy on Notice](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f535aa029&e=3ee4985eea)_
-_The National Interest_
U.S. public broadcasting “has come in for extensive criticism for, among other things, skewed priorities in its outreach to Iran, internal corruption and mismanagement, and a failure to provide much-needed political balance in its reporting on hostile regimes,” Ilan Berman writes. Now, “the White House seems prepared to do something about it.”
---

body:
We are seeing radicals in today's Democrat party motivated to enact a far Left agenda that includes the Green New Deal and Medicare for All.
Friend,
Montanans and all Americans are going through a difficult time right now, but by working together we will get through this crisis.
2020 has had an unconventional start due to Coronavirus. Even before, we were amazed to see how active the D.C. special interests were focusing on our state.
We are seeing radicals in today's Democrat party motivated to enact a far Left agenda that includes the Green New Deal and Medicare for All. They despise President Trump, want to defeat him at all costs, and want to elect someone who would enact these type policies as our state's next Governor.
These individuals have placed a big target on Montana going so far as recruiting our current Gov. Steve Bullock to run for Senate because it would increase the likelihood of getting high dollar donors and dark money PACs into Montana's races.

We are seeing radicals in today's Democrat party motivated to enact a far Left agenda that includes the Green New Deal and Medicare for All. They despise President Trump, want to defeat him at all costs, and want to elect someone who would enact these type policies as our state's next Governor. These individuals have placed a big target on Montana going so far as recruiting our current Gov. Steve Bullock to run for Senate because it would increase the likelihood of getting high dollar donors and dark money PACs into Montana's races. Friend, we can't risk losing our great state to the Democrats and their failed policies. #
Wow — A new poll in North Carolina’s Senate race shows Democrat Cal Cunningham leading Republican Senator Thom Tillis by 47-40% — and he just outraised Tillis by a 2-to-1 margin last quarter. **Cal has Republicans like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell running scared. They’ll do whatever it takes to defeat him, just like they’re trying to defeat us.** As we’re a little too familiar with, they’ll spare no expense to protect their own — which is why Mitch McConnell’s super PAC, the Republican National Committee, and the Senate Republicans’ campaign arm are all dumping millions into North Carolina to sink Cal’s campaign. But this race is one of our best chances to flip one of the four seats Democrats need to take back the majority. And it’s already on track to be the most expensive Senate race in the country — which means Cal needs our help. **Will you help Cal Cunningham keep up the momentum by splitting a contribution between his campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina and ours today? clean_body: | Wow — A new poll in North Carolina’s Senate race shows Democrat Cal Cunningham leading Republican Senator Thom Tillis by 47-40% — and he just outraised Tillis by a 2-to-1 margin last quarter. Cal has Republicans like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell running scared. They’ll do whatever it takes to defeat him, just like they’re trying to defeat us. As we’re a little too familiar with, they’ll spare no expense to protect their own — which is why Mitch McConnell’s super PAC, the Republican National Committee, and the Senate Republicans’ campaign arm are all dumping millions into North Carolina to sink Cal’s campaign. But this race is one of our best chances to flip one of the four seats Democrats need to take back the majority. And it’s already on track to be the most expensive Senate race in the country — which means Cal needs our help. Will you help Cal Cunningham keep up the momentum by splitting a contribution between his campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina and ours today? Together, we can flip the Senate and take the gavel out of McConnell’s hand. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Cal is a lifelong North Carolinian and a veteran with a proven record of public service. He’s running against Tillis because he knows that folks across his home state deserve a Senator who will listen and fight for them, not special interests. I may be biased, but I believe one of the best ways we can put our country back on the right track will be by flipping the Senate. That’s why I’m hoping you’d consider helping out Cal today. Thanks for everything. Stay safe. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Charles Booker
subject: We’re going to beat this man
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
There’s this narrative that Mitch McConnell is the most “powerful” man in the Senate. I’m not sure what powerful means if he’s been in the U.S. Senate over three decades and Kentucky still remains one of the poorest states in the country.
#
I’m going to beat this man. **WE are going to beat this man. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17187806/185647487/-561360944?refcode=em20200418&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTQ0OWZiNy1iMTgxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UK-UAQApjOTnEpFvkarm2JxIRz2EgjgeD4GcGQJApTw=)
**[Will you chip in $5 to join the movement that’s going to finally defeat Mitch McConnell once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17187820/185647501/-561360944?refcode=em20200418&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTQ0OWZiNy1iMTgxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UK-UAQApjOTnEpFvkarm2JxIRz2EgjgeD4GcGQJApTw=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17187821/185647502/-561360944?refcode=em20200418&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTQ0OWZiNy1iMTgxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UK-UAQApjOTnEpFvkarm2JxIRz2EgjgeD4GcGQJApTw=)****
There’s this narrative that Mitch McConnell is the most “powerful” man in the Senate.
I’m not sure what powerful means if he’s been in the U.S. Senate over three decades and Kentucky still remains one of the poorest states in the country.
****That’s not power. That’s exploitation.****
The only person who’s benefited from Mitch’s power is himself. Even now, in the midst of the COVID-19 crisis, he refuses to lift a finger for the working-class families who are struggling to make ends meet. But he’s okay pushing Trump’s distorted talking points around coronavirus and delaying relief efforts for Americans if it means making his donors happy.
It’s time to elect someone who’s the complete opposite of Mitch McConnell.
Someone who knows what it’s like to not have enough money for dinner. Someone who looks at his community and asks “how can I help?” Someone who isn’t afraid to fight for the right thing even when it isn’t politically convenient.
**[Will you chip in $5 to support our grassroots, progressive movement and send me to D.C.? I promise to fight for you and your family.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17187822/185647503/-561360944?refcode=em20200418&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTQ0OWZiNy1iMTgxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UK-UAQApjOTnEpFvkarm2JxIRz2EgjgeD4GcGQJApTw=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17187823/185647504/-561360944?refcode=em20200418&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTQ0OWZiNy1iMTgxLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UK-UAQApjOTnEpFvkarm2JxIRz2EgjgeD4GcGQJApTw=)****
Keep fighting,
Charles

** **

| | Trump's EPA wants to let companies poison you

[ACT NOW and demand that the administration protect the American people, not corporate profits:](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c7e/4bd7760e/5adb91ef/77af5af0/3298296282/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/petition/epa-pollution-rules?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+ACT+NOW+and+demand+that+the+administrati&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA&source=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA&refcode=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA")

| [SIGN ON](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c7e/4bd7760e/5adb91ef/77af5aff/3298296282/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/petition/epa-pollution-rules?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA&source=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA&refcode=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA")
---

It's come to this:

In the middle of the worst public health crisis in generations, the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) is suspending enforcement of environmental laws.

We knew that they'd use every opportunity available to weaken these regulations -- but a pandemic? **That 's despicable, even for Trump.**

The suspension has no end date, meaning it could last for the rest of Trump's term. And we haven't even mentioned the agency's plan to cripple scientific research.

[We must demand action. The EPA was established to protect public health, not industry. Join us today by adding your name here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c7e/4bd7760e/5adb91ef/77af5afe/3298296282/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/petition/epa-pollution-rules?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+We+must+demand+action+The+EPA+was+establ&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA&source=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA&refcode=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA")
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c7e/4bd7760e/5adb91ef/77af5afd/3298296282/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/petition/epa-pollution-rules?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA&source=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA&refcode=314_EM_JA_200418_1MO_1MC_none_STD_1_EPA")

We have to keep speaking out, no matter what.

314 Action Fund

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1.81 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

subject: 👀 Watch this video, Peter...
body:
Peter, here's a quick video for you to watch to help... * |
Dear Peter, Here's a short video of my recent interview I had with **The Daily Ledger** that I think you'll enjoy. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShbFSm&mc=9I&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EtRKwlb&) If you like the video (_or want to spread the word about what we've accomplished together_), then please forward this email to your friends and family who may be interested. Thank you for being such a wonderful partner in our mission, Peter. | | _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_

name: Team Warner
subject: coronavirus update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c886550/79149847/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---
Derek --

Team Warner hopes that you and your families are staying safe and healthy during this difficult time. We are committed to bringing you updates on what Mark Warner is working on to make sure that all Virginians are protected during this pandemic.

Here are just some of Mark's priorities from this week:
* Mark Warner and Tim Kaine are pushing the United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) to include Virginia in a **[pilot program that would modernize Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefits](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c88655f/79149847/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-kaine-urge-virginia-inclusion-in-usda-pilot-program/"),** so every Virginian has the resources they need during this outbreak.

* On Wednesday, Mark was appointed to a **[bipartisan congressional task force on reopening the economy.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c88655e/79149847/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.politico.com/news/2020/04/16/white-house-congress-advise-reopening-economy-190027")** He's committed to ensuring that the federal government's efforts to reopen our economy are bipartisan, data-driven, and based on the expertise of public health professionals and local elected officials.

* Mark joined his Democrat colleagues in the Senate to ask the Trump administration to **[extend work authorizations](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c88655d/79149847/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://thehill.com/homenews/senate/492982-senate-democrats-press-trump-to-extend-work-protections-for-daca-tps")** for those in the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) and Temporary Protected Status (TPS) programs during the coronavirus pandemic.

* There are stark racial disparities in coronavirus cases in Richmond and across the country, and Mark is working hard to address it. This week, Mark co-sponsored **[The Equitable Data Collection and Disclosure on COVID-19 Act,](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c88655c/79149847/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.richmond.com/special-report/coronavirus/in-richmond-more-than-twice-as-many-black-people-have-been-diagnosed-with-covid-19/article_d80c1e8f-492c-55ad-a0f0-dbfb955bc58c.html")** which would require the Department of Health and Human Services to track demographic data related to coronavirus testing, treatment, and infection rates to bring these disparities to light so we can better address them and serve our communities.

* Mark renewed his calls to **[ensure broadband internet access](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c88655b/79149847/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wavy.com/washington-dc/sen-warner-asks-fcc-to-take-immediate-action-to-help-provide-broadband-to-all-virginians/")** in rural areas of Virginia and across the country. At least 770,000 Virginians still don't have broadband access, and Mark is committed to making sure this changes.

* Mark and Tim Kaine called for **[funding to support victims of domestic violence and sexual assault](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c88655a/79149847/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wavy.com/community/virginia-senators-push-to-support-victims-of-domestic-violence-and-sexual-assault-during-stay-at-home-order/")** during Virginia's stay at home order, because staying home isn't safer for everyone.

* Mark was outspoken about the need to expand benefits for workers before this pandemic, and he continues to advocate for aid for gig workers, independent contractors, and other contingent workers when negotiating coronavirus relief packages. **[Read his new op-ed on the need to fix our social safety net to cover millions of Americans.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c886559/79149847/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.sfchronicle.com/opinion/openforum/article/Coronavirus-exposes-gig-workforce-left-behind-15201302.php")**

* This week, Mark and his wife Lisa Collis, made personal contributions to each of **[Virginia's regional food banks](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c886558/79149847/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wfxrtv.com/health/coronavirus/senator-warner-donates-70000-to-food-banks-across-virginia-including-feeding-southwest-virginia/")** to support communities across the Commonwealth during this difficult time.

* Mark held a virtual town hall event Thursday to talk about coronavirus response and answer questions from folks across the Commonwealth. In case you missed it, you can **[watch a recording of the event on Mark's Facebook page](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c886547/79149847/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.facebook.com/181467702005600/videos/2323638147937459/")** (you do not need a Facebook account to access this)!

Finally, we wanted to thank everyone who has sent contributions to local relief organizations, reached out to check on their neighbors, sent notes of support to Team Warner, or found another way to support their community during this time. We're weathering this storm together, and the generosity and heart of our supporters helps us make it through.

Be well,
Team Warner
|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c886546/79149847/VEsHBA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com") Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e8/53d9897e/54c89f21/1c886545/79149847/VEsHBw/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Greg Stanton
subject: our heroes on the frontlines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
**The COVID-19 pandemic has presented a threat like nothing we have ever seen before to the public health of our state. **

Thankfully, we are lucky to have brave essential workers in our state, who are heroically risking their health to keep our communities safe, fed, and healthy.

**However, our heroes deserve much more from the Federal Government for the heroic work they are doing, which is why I am calling for more personal protective equipment, paid sick leave, and emergency child care for our frontline workers. **

[**Will you sign on to demand more support for frontline workers?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/feI3v48bt3jHB3fbrAzoWAvCxz0VUuEhdbZmPmf34-M=/0MG4bulZ7hEHlFsrNPuNHe6ln30CHwjhiw6U_HI1Nic=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/feI3v48bt3jHB3fbrAzoWAvCxz0VUuEhdbZmPmf34-M=/0MG4bulZ7hEHlFsrNPuNHe6ln30CHwjhiw6U_HI1Nic=)

We CAN get through this public health crisis but it will require us all to step up to support the essential workers who are getting us through this difficult time.

**That means we need to keep social distancing, keep washing our hands, keep wearing masks, and keep up the pressure on the Federal Government to do more to support essential workers!**

[**Support greater protections for essential workers | SIGN ON »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/feI3v48bt3jHB3fbrAzoWAvCxz0VUuEhdbZmPmf34-M=/0MG4bulZ7hEHlFsrNPuNHe6ln30CHwjhiw6U_HI1Nic=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/feI3v48bt3jHB3fbrAzoWAvCxz0VUuEhdbZmPmf34-M=/0MG4bulZ7hEHlFsrNPuNHe6ln30CHwjhiw6U_HI1Nic=)

Thank you for taking a minute to support our heroes on the frontlines in the fight against COVID-19,

\-- _ Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---

4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: Thanking essential food workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3EnChX2nb9RF1Wl5iXD41aKuhzVGZoS_1QWrNmGnglU=/UkUnYYoJHJcNLN4vRZ_tzkFwcZncCN9qffjSRAno64A=)
---
| Folks, **I was proud to join Houston Independent School District (HISD) Interim Superintendent Dr. Grenita Lathan last week and again this afternoon in distributing free curbside meals to students and families in need.** Many of us have shown appreciation for the service of our frontline medical professionals and first responders who consistently risk their lives to keep us safe and healthy. **We are also fortunate to have others on the front lines working to ensure that we have another essential we cannot go without -- food.** From neighborhood grocery stores to fast food restaurants and school districts providing free meals for pick-up, these workers are truly unsung heroes. **I am grateful for the brave workers who make food distribution possible, and I want to extend my thanks for their hard work in ensuring that our community 's needs are being met. I was proud to express my gratitude by joining them at Sterling High School to distribute free meals to students and families.** Special thanks to HISD Interim Superintendent Dr. Lathan for her leadership and bravery. And of course, these efforts would not be possible without each of these unsung heroes. It is heartening to know that so many in our community are providing for others during this time of crisis. Let us continue to support each other however we can. In service, \-- Congressman Al Green
---
* * *
| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/3EnChX2nb9RF1Wl5iXD41aKuhzVGZoS_1QWrNmGnglU=/Y_4XqamImVsyMLoTlqPCHsZpBGqFv7Mq9Nu5mtZzXWg=) here.
---

subject: Tell Senator Schumer: Stop the Partisan Games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
One month ago, I proposed to my colleagues an idea to support America's small businesses. Senator Marco Rubio and I got together with a small bipartisan group and worked to pass legislation to support the small employers across the country that have been devastated by this pandemic.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDIyOTg0ODkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTk4MDA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIyOTg0ODkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTk4MDA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIyOTg0ODkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTk4MDA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Hi Peter,
One month ago, I proposed to my colleagues an idea to support America's small businesses.
Senator Marco Rubio and I got together with a small bipartisan group and worked to pass legislation to support the small employers across the country that have been devastated by this pandemic.
**The program has been a big success.**
In the less-than two weeks since the program went live, more than 1.63 million loan applications have been approved, providing $349 billion in assistance to small employers and their workers. These funds are crucial to ensure that hard working Americans continue to get a paycheck even though their businesses have been hard hit by this pandemic.
_In Maine, $2.22 billion has been provided to 16,196 small businesses. These forgivable loans will help these businesses survive and give paychecks to their employees._
One innovation in this program is that self-employed people are eligible for assistance. Plumbers, carpenters, barbers, stylists, electricians and many more are in need of immediate help.
But there is a problem. The program is out of money, and Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi have decided to play partisan games with this funding and have **blocked it** from passing.
**It 's outrageous and going to hurt self-employed people and workers at small businesses all across the country.**
[**Sign our petition to demand Chuck Schumer stop holding up this critical small business funding.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDIyOTg0ODkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTk4MDA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
I have spent my entire career fighting for Maine and the small businesses that power our economy. In this critical time, it is imperative we do all we can to help those businesses weather this pandemic.
[**Sign our petition to demand Chuck Schumer stop holding up this critical small business funding.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDIyOTg0ODkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTk4MDA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Small business is the cornerstone of our economy. It is hard working people who are going to lead our economic recovery. We need to support them now.
This shouldn't be about politics--It is time that Washington rise above the partisan fighting and ensure we take care of the small businesses that anchor our economy.
All my best,
Susan Collins
[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIyOTg0ODkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTk4MDA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDIyOTg0ODkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTk4MDA2NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Booker for Senate
subject: Humbly asking for your support today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
We've always been able to count on you. |
#
_We 're reaching out today because you're one of our most reliable supporters. Just the fact that you opened this email means a lot to Cory and the team. We ask that you only consider donating today if you're in a position to do so._ Friends -- Our finance team just ran the numbers and asked if we could reach out to some of Cory's top supporters and ask for your help. As we expected, our fundraising has taken a dip since we canceled all in-person fundraising events due to the pandemic. So, we need a lot of donations from grassroots supporters like you if we want to reach our April goal. We're about halfway through the month, so it's important we catch up as soon as possible. **We 're making plans on how to host virtual campaign events and organize online, but we need to make sure we have the resources to do it. Can you chip in $10 -- or whatever you can afford -- to help us catch up on our April goal?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cab-em-200418-fr?refcode=cab-em-200418-fr&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Virtual Discussion on Navigating Help for Small Businesses with Former SBA Associate Administrator Jeff Andrade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Makki For Congress Inc
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f25c37e1496e/amanda-makki-for-congress-update-1477945?e=bbeef49760)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
**_Virtual Discussion:_**

# **_Navigating Help for Small Businesses:_**

# **_Webinar with former SBA Associate Administrator, Jeff Andrade_**
**Monday, April 20 at 7:00 p.m.**
---
| | | |
---
**Amanda Makki**

Republican Candidate
Florida’s 13th District
| |
---
**Jeff Andrade**
Former SBA Associate
Administrator for Office of
Entrepreneurial Development
| | | **Join Amanda Makki, Republican Candidate for Florida’s 13th Congressional District this Monday, April 20th at 7:00 p.m. as she moderates a roundtable discussion on help for small businesses in Pinellas County. **

There’s a lot of national news about the Paycheck Protection Plan and provisions in the CARES Act impacting small business owners in Pinellas County. We will hear from Congressional Candidate for Florida’s 13th District, Amanda Makki, and Jeff Andrade, former SBA Associate Administrator for Office of Entrepreneurial Development.

_**Bio on Jeff Andrade:**_ During the 2008 Global Financial Crisis, Jeff managed $100 million in SBA programs that provide training and business counseling for over 2.4 million small business clients. He currently is Senior Vice President for The McKeon Group, a Washington, DC area consulting and advocacy group, where he leads the practice in Federal economic and workforce development and education and works with several Florida-based universities and businesses. He was actively involved in advocating for Federal assistance to several sectors in the CARES Act, recently signed by President Trump. Jeff combines over 30 years of political insights in Washington with real-world corporate experience helping businesses, colleges and other organizations navigate Washington's policy and financial issues. His career has been equally divided between government service and the private sector, nearly all of which has been in businesses that he has founded and others' small businesses. In the public sector, he served for over 14 years as a career civil servant, Congressional staffer, and political appointee in the Executive Branch, including Deputy Assistant Secretary for Postsecondary Education at the U.S. Department of Education.He started as an entry-level policy analyst and worked his way up to a Senior Executive Service position managing programs providing over $101 billion in annual aid to students. Jeff a bachelor’s degree with Honors from The American University in Washington, DC. He currently resides in Maryland with his wife, Catherine and son, Anthony, where he actively volunteers for local community, faith-based and political organizations.
